title: Claude Code plugin manifest
description: Schema for .claude-plugin/plugin.json. Catches common authoring mistakes like declaring default paths (which get loaded automatically and cause 'duplicate hooks' errors when also named in the manifest).

name.description: Kebab-case plugin name (a-z, 0-9, hyphens). This is what users type as `/plugin install <name>@<marketplace>`.

version.description: Semantic version (MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH with optional prerelease/build metadata).

commands.description: Custom path to the commands directory. OMIT unless your commands live somewhere other than ./commands/. Declaring the default path registers commands twice and will fail to load.

agents.description: Custom path to the agents directory. OMIT unless your agents live somewhere other than ./agents/.

skills.description: Custom path to the skills directory. OMIT unless your skills live somewhere other than ./skills/.

hooks.description: Custom path to additional hook files. OMIT to use the default ./hooks/hooks.json, which Claude Code loads automatically. Declaring the default path results in a duplicate-hooks load error.
